Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets
Off Calendar Dec-20-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Patricia Kyfe for Petitioner.
Henry Jenkins in Propria Persona.

Mr. Jenkins stated that there is a question of notice and that he has not received a complete copy of the Trust itself. The Court orders transfer of the Trust to San Mateo County. Status on receipt of transfer is set for February 14, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.
